name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, plugin reference, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New plugin reference
- [ ] New agent
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill/agent
- [ ] Project template enhancement
- [ ] Other

## Description

What would you like to see added or changed?

## Use Case

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Approach

If you have ideas about how to implement this, describe them here.

## References

Links to relevant documentation, plugins, or examples.
